chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-89 of 2026 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on urgent application 2. For orders on stay application 3. For hearing of main case 03.02.2026 Mr. Ali Asghar Chang, Advocate along with Petitioners M/s Muhammad Ismail Bhutto, Addl. A.G Sindh and Nazar Muhammad Memon, Addl.P.G Sindh along with Inspector Riaz Soomro SHO PS Talhar ----------- The Petitioners are present in Court along with their Counsel. Petitioner No.1 Mst Aneela has stated that she has contracted marriage with petitioner No.2 out of her own volition, free from coercion or pressure but against wishes of her parents/relatives hence being annoyed her father Faiz Muhammad (Respondent No.6) has lodged subject F.I.R. on false allegation that she has been abducted by petitioner No.2, who is her husband. Today, Inspector Riaz Soomro, SHO PS Talhar has recorded the statement of petitioner No.1 in which she has reiterated the same facts. The SHO further submits that in the light of such statement, he would submit a report before the learned Magistrate concerned disposing of the case in accordance with law. Petitioners and their counsel are satisfied and seek disposal of the petition in the said terms. Accordingly, this petition is disposed of in the above terms along with listed application. However, if the report is filed before learned Magistrate concerned he shall pass an appropriate order in accordance with law. The police officer present today is directed to provide protection to the petitioners according to law. JUDGE JUDGE Ali Haider
